# ContestOps AI Checklist

Version: `0.1.0`

| Status | Rule | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| open | Entrant meets individual/team/org eligibility and exclusions. | `docs/RULES_CHECKLIST.md` |
| active | Project created after 2026-05-19 with reused code disclosed. | `README.md and repo history` |
| active | At least one deployed LLM call uses the Gemini API. | `evidence/gemini_call_receipts` |
| planned | At least one Google Cloud product is used. | `evidence/google_cloud_receipts` |
| planned | Public demo video is under three minutes. | `docs/DECK_VIDEO_OUTLINE.md` |
| planned | Repository is public or shared with Devpost judging addresses. | `submission/devpost_payload.json` |
| planned | Revenue, costs, marketing spend, and monthly breakdown are ready. | `evidence/evidence_ledger.md` |
| planned | Real user evidence, breakdown, feedback, and consent are ready. | `evidence/evidence_ledger.md` |
| active | Agent logs, API records, dashboards, and execution receipts exist. | `automation/output` |

Deadline: 2026-08-17 13:00 PDT
